results.title: Gunman Fired 3 Shots at White House Before Being ‘Taken Down’ By Secret Service
results.description: A gunman fired three shots at the White House and hit a civilian before he exchanged fire with Secret Service and was "taken down," Fox News reported The post Gunman Fired 3 Shots at White House Before Being ‘Taken Down’ By Secret Service first appeared on Mediaite .
